v2026-05-09 22:33:51

2026-05-09 22:33:51

auto

@lhl

Created by smart-doc

1.商品管理

1.1.查询商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

name

string

商品名称

false

-

status

int16

审核状态

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

-

brandId

string

店铺ID

false

-

goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/list?id=158&page=1&limit=10&sort=bci18b&order=lghf34&name=carrol.mosciski&status=2025&goodsId=158&brandId=158&goodsSn=vba9qx

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "wjoly7",
  "errmsg": "04uzb8",
  "data": {}
}

1.2.获取店铺与分类选择列表

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/catAndBrand

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 获取店铺与分类选择列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/catAndBrand

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "ph9dvk",
  "errmsg": "iqqpbu",
  "data": {}
}

1.3.编辑商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

goods

object

商品基本信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

└─goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

└─name

string

商品名称

false

-

└─categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

└─brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

└─gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

└─brief

string

商品简介

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

└─shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

└─address

string

自提地址

false

-

└─isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

└─isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

└─isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

└─isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

└─unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

-

└─counterPrice

number

专柜价格

false

-

└─retailPrice

number

零售价格

false

-

└─detail

string

商品详细介绍，是富文本格式

false

-

└─remarks

string

商品备注

false

-

└─status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

-

└─weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

products

array

货品信息

false

-

└─id

string

商品货品表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specifications

array

商品规格值列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

└─price

number

商品货品价格

false

-

└─number

int32

商品货品数量

false

-

└─url

string

商品货品图片

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

grouponRules

object

团购规则

false

-

└─id

string

团购规则表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─goodsName

string

商品名称

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品图片或者商品货品图片

false

-

└─discount

number

优惠金额

false

-

└─discountMember

int32

团购人数

false

-

└─expireTime

string

团购过期时间

false

-

└─status

int16

团购规则状态，正常上线则0，到期自动下线则1，管理手动下线则2

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

attributes

array

商品参数

false

-

└─id

string

商品参数表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─attribute

string

商品参数名称

false

-

└─value

string

商品参数值

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

specifications

array

商品规格

false

-

└─id

string

商品规格表ID

false

-

└─goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

└─specification

string

商品规格名称

false

-

└─value

string

商品规格值

false

-

└─picUrl

string

商品规格图片

false

-

└─addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

└─updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

└─deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

└─tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

└─version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/update --data '{
  "goods": {
    "id": "158",
    "goodsSn": "kgjm0p",
    "name": "carrol.mosciski",
    "categoryId": "158",
    "brandId": "158",
    "gallery": [
      "zj116a"
    ],
    "keywords": "6f389p",
    "brief": "ee96q1",
    "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
    "shareUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
    "address": "189 Daine Terrace， Lake Weston， FL 87802",
    "isGroupon": true,
    "isNew": true,
    "isHot": true,
    "isTakeTheir": true,
    "unit": "bkz4h0",
    "counterPrice": 97,
    "retailPrice": 799,
    "detail": "taiwgl",
    "remarks": "15z3vl",
    "status": 22088,
    "weight": 880,
    "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "158",
    "version": 550
  },
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "158",
      "goodsId": "158",
      "specifications": [
        "1sxvrw"
      ],
      "price": 200,
      "number": 357,
      "url": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
      "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "158",
      "version": 131
    }
  ],
  "grouponRules": {
    "id": "158",
    "goodsId": "158",
    "goodsName": "carrol.mosciski",
    "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
    "discount": 866,
    "discountMember": 594,
    "expireTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "status": 24208,
    "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "158",
    "version": 438
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "id": "158",
      "goodsId": "158",
      "attribute": "wkq23o",
      "value": "bkwxe8",
      "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "158",
      "version": 988
    }
  ],
  "specifications": [
    {
      "id": "158",
      "goodsId": "158",
      "specification": "ozfvp4",
      "value": "a5n1vj",
      "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
      "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "158",
      "version": 897
    }
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "trsf4w",
  "errmsg": "87g1es",
  "data": {}
}

1.4.删除商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 删除商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/delete --data 'id=158'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "bd21ib",
  "errmsg": "hmvzsn",
  "data": {}
}

1.5.批量删除商品

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/batch-delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 批量删除商品

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

ids

array

id列表

true

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/batch-delete --data '{
  "ids": [
    "jny99o"
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "bpq7m5",
  "errmsg": "hzj3ss",
  "data": {}
}

1.6.商品上下架

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/on-sale

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 商品上下架

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

商品基本信息表ID

false

-

goodsSn

string

商品编号

false

-

name

string

商品名称

false

-

categoryId

string

商品所属类目ID

false

-

brandId

string

品牌id

false

-

gallery

array

商品宣传图片列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

keywords

string

商品关键字，采用逗号间隔

false

-

brief

string

商品简介

false

-

picUrl

string

商品页面商品图片

false

-

shareUrl

string

商品分享海报

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

isGroupon

boolean

是否团购商品

false

-

isNew

boolean

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

-

isHot

boolean

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

-

isTakeTheir

boolean

是否自提

false

-

unit

string

商品单位，例如件、盒

false

-

counterPrice

number

专柜价格

false

-

retailPrice

number

零售价格

false

-

detail

string

商品详细介绍，是富文本格式

false

-

remarks

string

商品备注

false

-

status

int16

商品状态：0待审核，1已上架，2已下架，3已驳回

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/on-sale --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "goodsSn": "pl63r0",
  "name": "carrol.mosciski",
  "categoryId": "158",
  "brandId": "158",
  "gallery": [
    "73a3ef"
  ],
  "keywords": "yrnwlc",
  "brief": "szznw2",
  "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "shareUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "address": "189 Daine Terrace， Lake Weston， FL 87802",
  "isGroupon": true,
  "isNew": true,
  "isHot": true,
  "isTakeTheir": true,
  "unit": "gfsaye",
  "counterPrice": 53,
  "retailPrice": 723,
  "detail": "xcw4b8",
  "remarks": "jzsmx4",
  "status": 3271,
  "weight": 702,
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 939
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "ypt34v",
  "errmsg": "s0miv5",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/create

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

goods

object

商品基本信息

false

-

└─id

string

false

-

string

false

-

string

false

string

false

string

false

array

是否新品首发，如果设置则可以在新品首发页面展示

false

是否人气推荐，如果设置则可以在人气推荐页面展示

false

false

int16

false

false

false

string

false

-

array

false

number

false

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/goods/create --data '{
  "goods": {
    "id": "158",
    "goodsSn": "6c4tsy",
    "name": "carrol.mosciski",
    "categoryId": "158",
    "brandId": "158",
    "gallery": [
      "kju1kf"
    ],
    "keywords": "qdel2x",
    "brief": "5c3rbn",
    "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
    "shareUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
    "address": "189 Daine Terrace， Lake Weston， FL 87802",
    "isGroupon": true,
    "isNew": true,
    "isHot": true,
    "isTakeTheir": true,
    "unit": "6ry6kr",
    "counterPrice": 239,
    "retailPrice": 986,
    "detail": "c565ar",
    "remarks": "8h3ib0",
    "status": 29767,
    "weight": 580,
    "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "158",
    "version": 681
  },
  "products": [
    {
      "id": "158",
      "goodsId": "158",
      "specifications": [
        "xx5gac"
      ],
      "price": 702,
      "number": 893,
      "url": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
      "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "158",
      "version": 763
    }
  ],
  "grouponRules": {
    "id": "158",
    "goodsId": "158",
    "goodsName": "carrol.mosciski",
    "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
    "discount": 121,
    "discountMember": 27,
    "expireTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "status": 5206,
    "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
    "deleted": true,
    "tenantId": "158",
    "version": 867
  },
  "attributes": [
    {
      "id": "158",
      "goodsId": "158",
      "attribute": "ndi5eu",
      "value": "hy4gi0",
      "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "158",
      "version": 159
    }
  ],
  "specifications": [
    {
      "id": "158",
      "goodsId": "158",
      "specification": "aqimms",
      "value": "3jtz2b",
      "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
      "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
      "deleted": true,
      "tenantId": "158",
      "version": 514
    }
  ]
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "4vnn3f",
  "errmsg": "pc45cl",
  "data": {}
}

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Description: 商品详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

└─any object

object

any object.

2.团购管理

2.1.查询参与用户

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/join

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询参与用户

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

status

int16

团购状态

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

ruleId

string

团购规则ID

false

-

grouponId

string

团购ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/join?id=158&page=1&limit=10&sort=llvpht&order=v1t0iz&status=3834&userId=158&ruleId=158&grouponId=158

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "dpv0bj",
  "errmsg": "hjjwy4",
  "data": {}
}

2.6.团购规则删除

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/delete

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 团购规则删除

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

团购规则ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/groupon/delete --data 'id=158'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

{

  "errmsg": "w0ivow",
  "data": {}
}

3.意见反馈

3.1.查询

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/feedback/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

username

string

用户名

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/feedback/list?id=158&page=1&limit=10&sort=pqc2vq&order=093rau&userId=158&username=carrol.mosciski&mobile=703.203.8278

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "0uur7r",
  "errmsg": "33bn6d",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

id

string

false

-

name

string

店铺名称

false

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/list?page=1&limit=10&sort=pm1ezk&order=5pp58w&id=158&name=carrol.mosciski

4.3.添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

品牌商表ID

false

-

name

string

品牌商名称

false

-

depict

string

品牌商简介

false

-

mail

string

品牌商邮箱

false

-

picUrl

string

品牌商页的品牌商图片

false

-

floorPrice

number

品牌商的商品低价，仅用于页面展示

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/create --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "name": "carrol.mosciski",
  "depict": "pq4i37",
  "mail": "zj5ps3",
  "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "floorPrice": 525,
  "address": "189 Daine Terrace， Lake Weston， FL 87802",
  "version": 131
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "o54akk",
  "errmsg": "yogmrw",
  "data": {}
}

4.4.编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

品牌商表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

name

string

品牌商名称

false

-

depict

string

品牌商简介

false

-

mail

string

品牌商邮箱

false

-

picUrl

string

品牌商页的品牌商图片

false

-

address

string

自提地址

false

-

floorPrice

number

品牌商的商品低价，仅用于页面展示

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

status

int8

0 可用, 1 禁用, 2 注销

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/brand/update --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "userId": "158",
  "name": "carrol.mosciski",
  "depict": "sgm7ht",
  "mail": "6ziqru",
  "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "address": "189 Daine Terrace， Lake Weston， FL 87802",
  "floorPrice": 866,
  "lookCount": 976,
  "likeCount": 168,
  "commentCount": 841,
  "status": 44,
  "weight": 113,
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 113
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "x15kfh",
  "errmsg": "va6c1l",
  "data": {}
}

false

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

inviterId

string

分享人

false

-

status

int16

分享状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/share/list?id=158&page=1&limit=10&sort=aa3omh&order=6lzyci&userId=158&inviterId=158&status=25418

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

  "errmsg": "gbiszo",
  "data": {}
}

id

广告表ID

false

-

name

string

广告标题

false

-

link

string

所广告的商品页面或者活动页面链接地址

false

-

url

string

广告宣传图片

false

-

position

int8

广告位置：1则是首页

false

-

content

string

活动内容

false

-

startTime

string

广告开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

广告结束时间

false

-

enabled

boolean

是否启动

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/ad/create --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "name": "carrol.mosciski",
  "link": "jiuxqp",
  "url": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "position": 23,
  "content": "pdewxl",
  "startTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "endTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "enabled": true,
  "weight": 913,
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 711
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

object

any object.

string

false

int32

int32

false

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

mail

string

邮箱

false

-

mobile

string

手机号

false

-

username

string

false

-

upfile

file

18.4.编辑赏金规则

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑赏金规则

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

赏金任务规则表ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品表的商品ID

false

-

goodsName

string

商品名称

false

-

goodsPrice

number

商品价格

false

-

picUrl

string

商品图片或者商品货品图片

false

-

award

number

奖励金额

false

-

joinersMember

int32

参与者数量

false

-

rewardMember

int32

活动数量

false

-

status

int16

赏金任务状态，0正常，1已完成，2已取消

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/reward/update --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "goodsId": "158",
  "goodsName": "carrol.mosciski",
  "goodsPrice": 143,
  "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "award": 847,
  "joinersMember": 394,
  "rewardMember": 31,
  "status": 18235,
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 635
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "i3iv2f",
  "errmsg": "cfgfld",
  "data": {}
}

string

string

false

-

end

string

false

array

false

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

false

string

string

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

goodsId

string

商品ID

false

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/dynamic/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 修改日常

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

动态表ID

false

-

userId

string

用户表的用户ID

false

-

content

string

发表内容

false

-

picUrls

array

图片地址列表，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

lookCount

int64

访问量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

isAdmin

boolean

是否管理员，0不是，1是

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/dynamic/update --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "userId": "158",
  "content": "oislc5",
  "picUrls": [
    "1syfkh"
  ],
  "likeCount": 234,
  "lookCount": 359,
  "commentCount": 459,
  "isAdmin": true,
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:55",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 913
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

{
  "errno": "z8per1",
  "errmsg": "y67ona",
  "data": {}
}

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

any object.

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/notice/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

-

title

string

通知标题

false

-

content

string

false

-

adminId

string

创建通知的管理员ID，如果是系统内置通知则是0.

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

  "id": "158",
  "title": "fdb7gu",
  "content": "wxxndi",
  "adminId": "158",
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 685
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

-

返回信息

-

data

any object.

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

true

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

int32

int16

false

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/read

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

No comments found.

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/read?id=158

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

string

返回信息

-

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "vzrtzl",
  "errmsg": "pcvpaw",
  "data": {}
}

29.4.添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

优惠券规则表ID

false

-

name

string

优惠券名称

false

-

depict

string

优惠券介绍，通常是显示优惠券使用限制文字

false

-

tag

string

优惠券标签，例如新人专用

false

-

total

int32

优惠券数量，如果是0，则是无限量

false

-

discount

number

优惠金额，

false

-

min

number

最少消费金额才能使用优惠券。

false

-

limit

int16

用户领券限制数量，如果是0，则是不限制；默认是1，限领一张.

false

-

type

int16

优惠券赠送类型，如果是0则通用券，用户领取；如果是1，则是注册赠券；如果是2，则是优惠券码兑换；

false

-

status

int16

优惠券状态，如果是0则是正常可用；如果是1则是过期; 如果是2则是下架。

false

-

goodsType

int16

商品限制类型，如果0则全商品，如果是1则是类目限制，如果是2则是商品限制。

false

-

goodsIds

array

商品限制值，goods_type如果是0则空集合，如果是1则是类目集合，如果是2则是商品集合。

false

-

code

string

优惠券兑换码

false

-

timeType

int16

有效时间限制，如果是0，则基于领取时间的有效天数days；如果是1，则start_time和end_time是优惠券有效期；

false

-

days

int16

基于领取时间的有效天数days。

false

-

startTime

string

使用券开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

使用券截至时间

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/create --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "name": "carrol.mosciski",
  "depict": "bh2t7z",
  "tag": "nu1z5a",
  "total": 40,
  "discount": 206,
  "min": 643,
  "limit": 13987,
  "type": 5747,
  "status": 7344,
  "goodsType": 7793,
  "goodsIds": [
    "zo04x6"
  ],
  "code": "96770",
  "timeType": 21007,
  "days": 7188,
  "startTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "endTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 180
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "rlumyw",
  "errmsg": "igrlms",
  "data": {}
}

29.5.编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

优惠券规则表ID

false

-

name

string

优惠券名称

false

-

depict

string

优惠券介绍，通常是显示优惠券使用限制文字

false

-

tag

string

优惠券标签，例如新人专用

false

-

total

int32

优惠券数量，如果是0，则是无限量

false

-

discount

number

优惠金额，

false

-

min

number

最少消费金额才能使用优惠券。

false

-

limit

int16

用户领券限制数量，如果是0，则是不限制；默认是1，限领一张.

false

-

type

int16

优惠券赠送类型，如果是0则通用券，用户领取；如果是1，则是注册赠券；如果是2，则是优惠券码兑换；

false

-

status

int16

优惠券状态，如果是0则是正常可用；如果是1则是过期; 如果是2则是下架。

false

-

goodsType

int16

商品限制类型，如果0则全商品，如果是1则是类目限制，如果是2则是商品限制。

false

-

goodsIds

array

商品限制值，goods_type如果是0则空集合，如果是1则是类目集合，如果是2则是商品集合。

false

-

code

string

优惠券兑换码

false

-

timeType

int16

有效时间限制，如果是0，则基于领取时间的有效天数days；如果是1，则start_time和end_time是优惠券有效期；

false

-

days

int16

基于领取时间的有效天数days。

false

-

startTime

string

使用券开始时间

false

-

endTime

string

使用券截至时间

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/coupon/update --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "name": "carrol.mosciski",
  "depict": "35svbs",
  "tag": "bfllty",
  "total": 141,
  "discount": 604,
  "min": 852,
  "limit": 11598,
  "type": 8611,
  "status": 21162,
  "goodsType": 6965,
  "goodsIds": [
    "6y3xa9"
  ],
  "code": "96770",
  "timeType": 20810,
  "days": 19779,
  "startTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "endTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 230
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "gnn7b9",
  "errmsg": "2q5oq3",
  "data": {}
}

Author: Ysling

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

question

string

问题标题

false

-

{
  "errno": "65ic69",
  "errmsg": "hawqnw",
  "data": {}

32.4.角色添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/role/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 角色添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

string

管理员token

true

-

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

角色表ID

false

-

name

string

角色名称

false

string

角色描述

false

-

enabled

boolean

是否启用

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/role/create --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "name": "carrol.mosciski",
  "depict": "csev65",
  "enabled": true,
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 458

33.专题管理

33.1.专题列表

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 专题列表

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

title

string

标题

false

-

subtitle

string

子标题

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/list?id=158&page=1&limit=10&sort=asltrn&order=xvymne&title=g3wr86&subtitle=2w8mut

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "dteq7e",
  "errmsg": "bb4ugz",
  "data": {}
}

33.2.专题添加

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/create

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 专题添加

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

专题表ID

false

-

title

string

专题标题

false

-

subtitle

string

专题子标题

false

-

author

string

专题作者

false

-

content

string

专题内容，富文本格式

false

-

price

number

专题相关商品最低价

false

-

readCount

string

专题阅读量

false

-

likeCount

int64

点赞量

false

-

commentCount

int64

评论数量

false

-

picUrl

string

专题图片

false

-

goodsIds

array

专题相关商品，采用JSON数组格式

false

-

weight

int32

权重用于排序

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/topic/create --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "title": "4wppjx",
  "subtitle": "7ntof9",
  "author": "Grant Gulgowski",
  "content": "thd3jc",
  "price": 306,
  "readCount": "cu3vmr",
  "likeCount": 914,
  "commentCount": 687,
  "picUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "goodsIds": [
    "ov96ye"
  ],
  "weight": 624,
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 464
}'

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

└─any object

any object.

35.用户管理

35.1.用户查询

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户查询

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

username

string

用户名称

false

-

mobile

string

联系电话

false

-

inviter

string

用户邀请者

false

-

level

int8

用户等级

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/list?id=158&page=1&limit=10&sort=trgagp&order=gpx8st&userId=158&username=carrol.mosciski&mobile=703.203.8278&inviter=1n1f30&level=104

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "cu1ea5",
  "errmsg": "4xue2v",
  "data": {}
}

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/detail

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户详情

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

用户ID

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/detail?id=158

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "krg1q0",
  "errmsg": "1bgg8d",
  "data": {}
}

35.3.用户编辑

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/update

Type: POST

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/json

Description: 用户编辑

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Body-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

用户表ID

false

-

inviter

string

邀请者

false

-

username

string

用户名称

false

-

password

string

用户密码

false

-

trueName

string

真实姓名

false

-

gender

int8

性别：0 未知， 1男， 2女

false

-

birthday

string

生日

false

-

shareUrl

string

个人分享图片

false

-

lastLoginTime

string

最近一次登录时间

false

-

lastLoginIp

string

最近一次登录IP地址

false

-

userLevel

int8

0 普通用户，1 VIP用户，2 高级VIP用户

false

-

integral

number

用户积分

false

-

nickName

string

用户昵称或网络名称

false

-

mobile

string

用户手机号码

false

-

avatarUrl

string

用户头像图片

false

-

openid

string

微信登录openid

false

-

sessionKey

string

微信登录会话KEY

false

-

status

int8

0 可用, 1 禁用, 2 注销

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

-

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

-

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/update --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "inviter": "mk6q8o",
  "username": "carrol.mosciski",
  "password": "vxvt9b",
  "trueName": "carrol.mosciski",
  "gender": 15,
  "birthday": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "shareUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "lastLoginTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "lastLoginIp": "142.79.167.181",
  "userLevel": 47,
  "integral": 321,
  "nickName": "jacques.wiza",
  "mobile": "703.203.8278",
  "avatarUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "openid": "158",
  "sessionKey": "eknnzk",
  "status": 80,
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 12
}'

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

-

Response-example:

{
  "errno": "f26hwo",
  "errmsg": "k780cz",
  "data": {}
}

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

file

file

No comments found.

true

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -F 'file=' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/upload

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

-

└─any object

object

any object.

  "data": {}

35.6.用户交易记录

URL: https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/deal-list

Type: GET

Author: Ysling

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=UTF-8

Description: 用户交易记录

Request-headers:

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

true

-

Query-parameters:

ParameterTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

id

string

序号ID

false

-

page

int32

分页页码 (默认：1)

false

-

limit

int32

查询数量 (默认：10) (0:查询全部)

false

-

sort

string

排序字段 (默认：add_time)

false

-

order

string

正序或倒叙排序，desc -- asc （默认：desc）

false

-

userId

string

用户ID

false

-

dealType

int16

交易类型

false

-

status

boolean

交易状态

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X GET -k -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/user/deal-list?id=158&page=1&limit=10&sort=nx4jb0&order=wn48w7&userId=158&dealType=24315&status=true

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

errno

string

状态码

-

errmsg

string

返回信息

-

data

object

返回实体结果

  "data": {}

HeaderTypeDescriptionRequiredSince

X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token

string

管理员token

string

租户表ID

string

token

string

false

-

mchId

string

微信商户号

false

string

微信商户密钥

false

string

微信支付证书地址

false

string

微信支付v3密钥

false

string

微信支付证书地址.cert

false

string

false

jdbcUrl

false

false

password

string

false

driverClassName

string

数据库驱动

false

-

addTime

string

创建时间

false

-

updateTime

string

更新时间

false

-

deleted

boolean

逻辑删除

false

tenantId

string

租户ID，用于分割多个租户

false

version

int32

更新版本号

false

-

Request-example:

curl -X POST -k -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-ShopFlow-Admin-Token' -i https://manager.enshipeixue.com/admin/tenant/create --data '{
  "id": "158",
  "address": "189 Daine Terrace， Lake Weston， FL 87802",
  "appId": "158",
  "appSecret": "4kq553",
  "aesKey": "rbigc5",
  "token": "k4q60p",
  "mchId": "158",
  "mchKey": "i0nsk8",
  "keyPath": "6rhw9r",
  "apiV3Key": "v3325u",
  "privateCertPath": "feijeu",
  "privateKeyPath": "zytiqj",
  "jdbcUrl": "www.myrtie-fay.us",
  "username": "carrol.mosciski",
  "password": "cvtpli",
  "driverClassName": "carrol.mosciski",
  "addTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "updateTime": "2026-05-09 22:33:56",
  "deleted": true,
  "tenantId": "158",
  "version": 698
}'
